title: CVE-2026-41054: haveged Root Exploit
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-41054 is a missing exit out of permission check in haveged that could lead to a root exploit. A patch is currently available to address this vulnerability. Why now: The vulnerability is potentially exploitable in the wild. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability affects the os kernel and allows for privilege escalation.
